description: Letter sent from al-Mahdiyya (Gil)/ Sicily (Ben-Sasson) by Ismail b. Yaʿaqov al-Andalusi to his nephew, Yeshua b. Natan in Fustat, dealing with goods sent to the Maghreb and other business matters. (Information from M. Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 891 and from M. Ben-Sasson, Yehudei Sitzilya, p. 245)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
